message.content:
[
  {
    "title": "Standard Eurobarometer (Series)",
    "description": "Cross-national public opinion surveys of EU residents covering political behaviour, trust in institutions, evaluations of governments, democracy, and political systems. Widely used to study political attitudes and participation across Europe.",
    "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
    "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Government, political systems and organisations"],
    "series_or_collection": "Eurobarometer",
    "geographic_coverage": "Europe (EU Member States)"
  },
  {
    "title": "European Values Study (EVS) Integrated Dataset",
    "description": "Multinational survey on values and attitudes including democracy, trust in institutions, political participation, and views on government. Integrates multiple waves for time-series analyses.",
    "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
    "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Government, political systems and organisations"],
    "series_or_collection": "European Values Study",
    "geographic_coverage": "Europe (multiple countries)"
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP Role of Government (Series)",
    "description": "International Social Survey Programme modules on government responsibilities, spending priorities, intervention, performance and trust. Provides comparative data on attitudes towards government and public policy.",
    "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
    "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Government, political systems and organisations"],
    "series_or_collection": "ISSP",
    "geographic_coverage": "International (multiple countries)"
  },
  {
    "title": "German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) – Post-election Cross-Section (Germany)",
    "description": "Comprehensive post-election survey of the German electorate on vote choice, party evaluations, political efficacy, issue positions, and assessments of the federal government and political system.",
    "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
    "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Government, political systems and organisations"],
    "series_or_collection": "GLES",
    "geographic_coverage": "Germany"
  },
  {
    "title": "European Election Study (EES) – Voter Study",
    "description": "Survey of voting behaviour and political attitudes in European Parliament elections, including party preferences, turnout, EU and national institutional evaluations, and political engagement.",
    "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
    "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Government, political systems and organisations"],
    "series_or_collection": "European Election Studies",
    "geographic_coverage": "Europe (EU Member States)"
  },
  {
    "title": "ALLBUS – German General Social Survey (Cumulation)",
    "description": "Cumulative dataset of repeated cross-sections in Germany including political interest, party identification, trust in institutions, satisfaction with democracy, and attitudes toward government and policy.",
    "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
    "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Government, political systems and organisations"],
    "series_or_collection": "ALLBUS",
    "geographic_coverage": "Germany"
  },
  {
    "title": "Politbarometer (Series)",
    "description": "Regular German public opinion surveys capturing vote intention, government approval, evaluations of political actors, issue salience, and attitudes toward political institutions.",
    "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
    "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Government, political systems and organisations"],
    "series_or_collection": "Politbarometer",
    "geographic_coverage": "Germany"
  },
  {
    "title": "Candidate Countries Eurobarometer (Series)",
    "description": "Surveys in EU candidate and acceding countries focusing on political attitudes, trust in institutions, democracy, and perceptions of governance and European integration.",
    "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
    "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Government, political systems and organisations"],
    "series_or_collection": "Eurobarometer",
    "geographic_coverage": "Europe (EU candidate countries)"
  },
  {
    "title": "GLES – Rolling Cross-Section (Germany)",
    "description": "Daily survey series around German federal election campaigns to analyze short-term dynamics in voting behaviour, campaign effects, and evolving attitudes toward parties, candidates, and government.",
    "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
    "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Government, political systems and organisations"],
    "series_or_collection": "GLES",
    "geographic_coverage": "Germany"
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP Citizenship (Series)",
    "description": "International Social Survey Programme modules on citizenship, civic engagement, political participation, rights and duties, and evaluations of democratic institutions and governance.",
    "host": "GESIS – Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences",
    "topics": ["Political behaviour and attitudes", "Government, political systems and organisations"],
    "series_or_collection": "ISSP",
    "geographic_coverage": "International (multiple countries)"
  }
]
